title: Image To Image Cinematic Taco Flip Street Cart
sourceTitle: Image To Image Cinematic Taco Flip Street Cart Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image hyper-realistic 2:3 poster using attached taco image before cinematic street-cart freeze-frame transformation, turning same taco from the uploaded reference image into a cinematic street-cart freeze-frame. Subject: same taco from the uploaded reference image keeps the recognizable taco structure from the uploaded reference while flipping mid-air above a scarred stainless-steel street-cart counter, tack-sharp and appetizing. Scene: Urban street-side taco cart at night with harsh overhead streetlamp, warm cone of light, steam from the grill, faint oil smoke, airborne crumbs, custom round taco press, and battered transit-station flip-clock reading 19 03. Composition: Fixed Dutch-tilted low three-quarter camera angle from slightly below the taco, taco large and centered, background motion-blurred, counter foreground grounded, and supporting action elements falling lettuce, salsa droplets, lime wedges, and motion crumbs frozen around the hero food. Signature Elements: Mid-flip taco, Dutch tilt, low three-quarter angle, scarred street cart, overhead lamp, steam, oil smoke, airborne crumbs, chili-pattern taco press, flip-clock time, and cinematic street-food urgency. Style: Hyper-realistic food action poster, cinematic urban street-food photography, high-resolution commercial detail, clean appetizing mood, motion urgency, and dramatic poster finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm streetlamp amber, stainless-steel grey, charred tortilla gold, salsa red, lime green, shadow black, and natural taco ingredient colors. Lighting: Single harsh overhead streetlamp from top-left with focused warm highlights, crisp shadows, steam glow, oil-smoke depth, and tack-sharp taco illumination. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
